issues_found: Source is a listing_page (verified via source metadata: DISCOVERY_METHOD: crawl) - listing pages are non-archiveable per rule 5
No single event_type can be assigned to a collection of heterogeneous educational articles
Published_at field is blank despite individual article dates spanning December 2023 to September 2025
No macro catalyst or market structure content present - this is a navigation hub for educational content
Does not meet archival value criteria for finance research

corrected_fields.summary: This is a Bank of Canada educational hub page containing links to multiple short explainer articles on various economic topics spanning from December 2023 to September 2025. It is not a single archiveable document or macro catalyst event. Topics covered include payments innovation, business investment uncertainty, Canadian inflation, Indigenous economies, productivity, grocery prices, labour force participation, gasoline prices, and interest rate transmission.
corrected_fields.why_it_matters: This source is not directly relevant to macro catalysts or market structure for archival purposes. It is an educational portal with general interest content rather than a policy decision, data release, or research paper containing specific market-moving information.
